ogTitle: Gil Gil vs Gillieston: Climate Safety

heading: Gil Gil vs Gillieston — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gil Gil, Victoria and Gillieston, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gil Gil has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Gillieston (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gil Gil or Gillieston safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gil Gil has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Gillieston scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gil Gil scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Gillieston scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gil Gil or Gillieston?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gil Gil has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
